mapper.sql: comment_id , board_id , content , writer , delete_yn , created_date , modified_date
mapper.delete: UPDATE notice_comment SET delete_yn = 1 WHERE comment_id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM notice_comment WHERE delete_yn = 0 AND board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY comment_id DESC LIMIT #{pagination.limitStart}, #{recordSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice_comment WHERE delete_yn = 0 AND board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.update:
update notice_comment set delete_yn = 1 where comment_id in
#{item}
